name: Signal-to-Fix Agent Use
description: Machine-readable entrypoint for AI agents that turn X/Twitter feedback into keep-only PR specs and implementation prompts.

agentConversionSummary.problemSolved: Turns noisy feedback into actionable keep-only issue clusters, priority ranking, PR specs, implementation prompts, Codex prompts, Markdown export, and JSON export.
agentConversionSummary.whenToUse: Use after an agent has gathered candidate X/Twitter feedback and needs a reviewable implementation plan without letting weak or discarded posts affect downstream output.
agentConversionSummary.inputToSend: productName, productUrl, targetArea, and one feedback string per candidate post.
agentConversionSummary.expectedOutput: Keep-only analytical outputs: issue clusters, priority ranking, highest-priority PR spec, implementation prompt, Codex prompt, Markdown export, and JSON export.
agentConversionSummary.paidAction: Use the linked HyperXosist-Agent x402 endpoint to generate/search candidate X feedback before running Signal-to-Fix as an agent workflow.
agentConversionSummary.on402: Read x402-payment.json and paymentOptionsEndpoint, complete the x402 payment, then retry the same POST to the payment endpoint.

payment.instruction: AI agents should use the linked HyperXosist paid x402 route to generate/search candidate X feedback, then pass only resulting feedback text into Signal-to-Fix for keep-only PR spec generation.

workflow: POST search input to the configured x402 endpoint and complete payment.
Use the paid HyperXosist result to collect candidate X/Twitter feedback.
Use only decision === "keep" items for clusters, ranking, PR specs, implementation prompts, Codex prompts, Markdown export, and JSON export.

complementaryPositioning.signalToFix: Feedback/noise -> actionable issue, PR spec, and implementation prompt.
complementaryPositioning.hyperxosist: Agent-facing execution/query layer with x402 payment flow.
complementaryPositioning.whyTogether: HyperXosist helps an agent find cleaner feedback candidates through a paid query path; Signal-to-Fix converts those candidates into keep-only implementation artifacts.
